entity.summary: Metis ecosystem single-sided automated-market-maker decentralized exchange providing stable-asset swaps, liquidity pools, veHUM governance locking, gauges, rewards, and dashboard surfaces.
entity.notes: Current first-party Hummus exchange application exposes active Swap, Pool, veHUM, Gauge, Rewards, Dashboard, Claim, and wallet-connect surfaces. DefiLlama identifies Hummus AMM as a Metis single-sided AMM and reports current TVL plus non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume.

evidence.title: Hummus Exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes wallet connection, token swap controls, Pool, veHUM, Gauge, Rewards, Dashboard, and Claim navigation.

evidence.title: Hummus official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party Hummus domain remains reachable and anchors the Hummus exchange application family.

evidence.title: Hummus AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus identifies Hummus AMM as a Metis decentralized exchange, corroborating the current first-party swap and liquidity application.

evidence.title: Hummus Finance official exchange website
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party Hummus exchange domain remains reachable at review time.

evidence.title: Hummus AMM protocol metrics and information
evidence.notes: Current profile identifies Hummus as a single-sided Metis AMM for stable-asset exchange and reports current TVL and non-zero recent DEX volume.
